channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-19 06:49 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok 4.20 Beta dropped insane benchmark numbers: lowest hallucination rate ever recorded at 22%, num...
item.description: Grok 4.20 Beta dropped insane benchmark numbers: lowest hallucination rate ever recorded at 22%, number 1 in following instructions at 83%, and #2 in agentic tool use at 97%. This is a 500B model that was specifically built to tell the truth first, and it’s still crushing the things that actually matter most. Source:@XFreeze

item.title: @elonmusk: FSD is literally 8.1x safer than a human driver. AI healthcare will be end up being a similar multip...
item.description: FSD is literally 8.1x safer than a human driver. AI healthcare will be end up being a similar multiple better than a human doctor.

item.title: @elonmusk: There is a popular myth that Poland enjoys its economic miracle because it didn’t accept immigrants....
item.description: There is a popular myth that Poland enjoys its economic miracle because it didn’t accept immigrants. In reality, it did let them in, but unlike Western Europe, Poland offers no lavish welfare. Most immigrants work, integrate, and contribute to society. That’s the difference.

item.title: @elonmusk: QatarEnergy Statement on Missile Attacks on Ras Laffan Industrial City QatarEnergy confirms that Ras...
item.description: QatarEnergy Statement on Missile Attacks on Ras Laffan Industrial City QatarEnergy confirms that Ras Laffan Industrial City this evening has been the subject of missile attacks. Emergency response teams were deployed immediately to contain the resulting fires, as extensive damage has been caused. All personnel have been accounted for and no casualties have been reported at this time. QatarEnergy will continue to communicate the latest available information.#Qatar

item.title: @elonmusk: I estimate that Tesla self-driving has already prevented more than 100 fatalities and well over 3,00...
item.description: I estimate that Tesla self-driving has already prevented more than 100 fatalities and well over 3,000 crashes.

item.title: @elonmusk: The extreme environmentalist movement has gone so far off the deep end that they literally treat hum...
item.description: The extreme environmentalist movement has gone so far off the deep end that they literally treat humanity like a plague on Earth Legacy media is literally publishing op-eds wishing for a population of zero. It’s pure anti-human propaganda, and they are not even hiding it You can see this across left-wing media outlets, constantly pushing this wicked ideology to their readers

item.title: @elonmusk: Put your loved ones in Teslas. Go into debt if you have to.
item.description: Put your loved ones in Teslas. Go into debt if you have to.

item.title: @elonmusk: If a politician gets mad about fraud being exposed They aren’t working for you, they are working aga...
item.description: If a politician gets mad about fraud being exposed They aren’t working for you, they are working against you That is all you need to know about them

item.title: @elonmusk: Status: Day 19,977 of retardmaxxing. Things going really well.
item.description: Status: Day 19,977 of retardmaxxing. Things going really well.

item.title: @elonmusk: I use Grok Heavy all the time now bc it’s so much faster… before, even though I had it, I didn’t use...
item.description: I use Grok Heavy all the time now bc it’s so much faster… before, even though I had it, I didn’t use it as much bc it was taking so much longer. Now it’s super fast with 16 agents working simultaneously.

item.title: @elonmusk: Based just means knowing and saying the truth
item.description: Based just means knowing and saying the truth

item.title: @elonmusk: Cool, well Grok will get even better every week!
item.description: Cool, well Grok will get even better every week!
